character.label: Character
character.description: Character identity, role, behavior, or season-local status.

event.label: Event
event.description: Episode event or durable story-state change.

faction.label: Faction
faction.description: Crew, polity, organization, or diplomatic state.

knowledge.label: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Who knows, hides, or misunderstands season-local information.

relationship.label: Relationship
relationship.description: Social bond, trust state, obligation, or grief state.

rule.label: Rule
rule.description: Technology, command, legal, cultural, or anomaly constraint.

secret.label: Secret
secret.description: Hidden identity, reveal timing, spoiler guard, or unresolved truth.
